DescribeLLMSessionsStatistics.filters: Filter list. Supported fields: sessionId, userId, duration (response time in ms), inputTokens, outputTokens, totalTokens, traceCount
DescribeLLMSessionsStatistics.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeLLMSessionsStatistics.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMSessionsStatistics.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
